creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Nicola Mingotti from comment #4)

> … FreeBSD in a VMWare virtual machine in a MacBook Pro 2014. …

(In reply to yzrh from comment #6)

> … likely GPU related. …

(In reply to Nicola Mingotti from comment #7)

> … I confirm @yzrh findings. …


Now, please: which version of FreeBSD, _exactly_?

freebsd-version -kru ; uname -aKU


Packages from quarterly, or latest? 

pkg -vv | grep -e url -e enabled -e priority


Which packages are installed? For simplicity: 

pkg prime-origins | sort


Which version of VMWare? 

What are your virtual graphics preferences for the FreeBSD guest?

How much memory is given to the guest? 

How much physical memory does the Mac have? 

What's the model identifier of the Mac? (Find this in System Information.)

Which version of macOS?
